title: puccinellia pseudodistans
intro: Puccinellia pseudodistans, also known as salt grass or saltwort, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that thrives in salt-rich environments, particularly in coastal areas and salt lakes. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Puccinellia pseudodistans is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
